title: 10 Reusable Cup with Straw and Lid 24OZ Plastic Cups Colorful Glitter Tumblers for Cold Drinks Iced Coffee Set & Brush, Party Tumbler Travel Mug COLORS
features: 【Food-Grade & High-Quality Material】Our reusable plastic cups with lids and straws are made of high-quality and food grade PP material, BPA-Free, safe for kids and your family. Our drink cups with lids and straws are sturdy and durable enough to last for many years.

【Perfect Size】Capacity of our tumbler with straw and lid: 24 ounces (710 ml), height: 7 inches, diameter of the lid: 4 inches. These 10 pack of party tumbler cups are designed with just the right size for a comfortable grip and holds enough for cold drink like iced smoothie, coffee, milkshake, juice, cocktails or chilled drinking water.

【Leak-Proof & Travel-Friendly】The sealable lids are designed to fit securely on our straw cup to prevent spills, the straw with a fixed ring can avoid slipping out of cups. Besides, our cups with straws and lids are stackble for esay storage, the bottom fits most vehicle cup holders, ideal for on-the-go use, perfect as party supplies and kids cups.

【10 Reusable Cups with Cleaning Tools】Package include: 10 different colors of reusable cup with straw and lid, enough to satisfy your party needs. Our cold cups with lid and straw comes with cup brush and straw brush for easy cleaning. Our plastic cup with straw and lid can also be cleaned in dishwasher.

【Suitable for Any Occasion】Our tumblers with straws and lids are designed with beautiful and shiny glitter sequins, with bright, lovely color changing effect when filled with water, both children and adults will love our cute cups. Perfect for family, party, picnic, office, gym, beach holidays or birthday party etc. These drinking cups with lids and straws are also great for custom DIY creations. Enjoy your drink with these unique and stylish set of cold cup with lid and straw !
description: Product Description ZITFRI High Quality Plastic Tumblers With Lids and Straws For Cold Drinks 10 Colours With Shinny Glitter : Dark Blue, Orange, Purple, Rose, Red, Mint Green, Yellow, Pink, Army Green, Fluorescent Green Material: PP Dishwasher Safe DURABLE AND REUSABLE FOR MANNY YEARS SAFE AND RELAIBLE MATERIAL LEAK PROOF DESIGN YOUR BEST COLD DRINK COMPANION
